mapper.select: SELECT a.code, a.area_name as areaName, a.parent_code as parentCode, a.level, r.longitude, r.latitude, r.sort FROM tbl_area_node a LEFT JOIN tbl_area_range r ON a.code = r.code ORDER BY r.sort ASC, a.code ASC

SELECT a.code, a.area_name as areaName, a.parent_code as parentCode, a.level, r.longitude, r.latitude, r.sort FROM tbl_area_node a LEFT JOIN tbl_area_range r ON a.code = r.code ORDER BY r.sort ASC, a.code ASC
SELECT a.code, a.area_name as areaName, a.parent_code as parentCode, a.level FROM tbl_area_node a ORDER BY a.code ASC
SELECT r.longitude, r.latitude, r.sort FROM tbl_area_range r WHERE r.code = #{code} ORDER BY r.sort ASC
